# Hooke v0.0.1 — Project Setup & Milestones

## Overview

`ctr26/hooke` is a **monorepo** — standards, templates, and all library code live together.
`hooke-core` is the library. The root repo holds the 6-file standard and templates.

Migration to `recursionpharma/hooke` can be evaluated later — git history carries over; if not, it's not a blocker.

## Design Principles

- **No pipeline classes** — pipelines are just nested functions composed from atomic operations
- **No submodules** — everything is a subfolder in the monorepo
- **Each module owns its CI/CD** — only changes in that subfolder trigger its pipeline

## Monorepo Structure

```
hooke/                        ← monorepo root (standards + templates)
│
├── hooke-core/               ← the library (standards only for now)
├── hooke-px/                 ← PX models (was hooke-forge)
├── hooke-tx/                 ← TX models (was hookeTx)
├── hooke-eval/               ← evaluation & benchmarks (was hooke-vcb)
├── hooke-schemas/            ← shared schemas (standards only for now)
│
├── templates/                ← project scaffolding
├── .github/workflows/        ← per-module CI/CD pipelines
├── PROJECT.md, AGENTS.md … ← 6-file standard
└── README.md
```

## Renames

| Old Name       | New Name        | Reason                        |
|----------------|-----------------|-------------------------------|
| `hooke-forge`  | `hooke-px`      | Align with model domain       |
| `hookeTx`      | `hooke-tx`      | Normalize casing              |
| `hooke-vcb`    | `hooke-eval`    | Clarify purpose               |

## CI/CD Strategy

```
                  push / PR to hooke/
                         │
              ┌──────────┼──────────────┐
              ▼          ▼              ▼
        path filter  path filter   path filter
       hooke-core/   hooke-px/    hooke-tx/  ...
              │          │              │
              ▼          ▼              ▼
         ┌────────┐ ┌────────┐    ┌────────┐
         │  lint  │ │  lint  │    │  lint  │
         │  test  │ │  test  │    │  test  │
         │  type  │ │  type  │    │  type  │
         └────────┘ └────────┘    └────────┘
              │                        │
     full coverage              module-scoped
   (hooke-core,                  coverage
    hooke-schemas)
```

- Each module gets its own workflow triggered by `paths: ['<module>/**']`
- **Full test coverage** required for `hooke-core` and `hooke-schemas`
- Other modules: module-scoped coverage (synchronise standards later)

## Setup Plan

- [ ] **initStack tag** — initial project scaffold
- [ ] Create subfolder structure (`hooke-core/`, `hooke-px/`, `hooke-tx/`, `hooke-eval/`, `hooke-schemas/`)
- [ ] Skills and docs live in the repo root
- [ ] Code lives in dedicated subfolders
- [ ] Set up per-module CI/CD with path filters
- [ ] Test on Cas' PR as first validation

## v0.0.1 Milestones

- [ ] **Hooke the library** (`hooke-core`) — clean package / notebook interface
- [ ] **Clean testing structure** — tests only where people are already comfortable
- [ ] **(Lazy) load PX and TX models** (`hooke-px`, `hooke-tx`)
- [ ] **SLURM inference**
- [ ] **Valence data folder cache** (or BigQuery — ty Cas) — no more random parquets in home dirs
- [ ] **Shared schemas** (`hooke-schemas`) — define and validate data contracts
- [ ] **Generate maps**
- [ ] **Run benchmarks** (`hooke-eval`)
- [ ] **Return metrics & log in W&B**

## Ownership

| Module          | Owners       | Coverage     |
|-----------------|-------------|--------------|
| `hooke-core`    | Manu, Craig | Full         |
| `hooke-px`      | Jason       | Module-scoped|
| `hooke-tx`      | (TBD)       | Module-scoped|
| `hooke-eval`    | (TBD)       | Module-scoped|
| `hooke-schemas` | Craig, Cas  | Full         |

## Follow-up

- Turn each milestone into its own issue and assign owners
- Set up CODEOWNERS file mapping subfolders to owners
- Unify CI/CD standards across modules once patterns stabilise
